The situation remains tense with Israel controlling much of Gaza and UN warnings on humanitarian crisis.

results.prediction: Schedule Policy/Career legal challenge succeeds or fails
results.description: Schedule Policy/Career reclassifications took effect in March 2026 amid ongoing union lawsuits, with no reported final federal court ruling or injunction on the core policy as of March 24, 2026. Multiple sources confirm lawsuits and trainings are active, but the prediction remains unresolved.

results.prediction: Mojtaba Khamenei confirmed as Supreme Leader of Iran
results.description: No confirmation of Mojtaba Khamenei as Supreme Leader by the Assembly of Experts as of March 24, 2026. Search results confirm Khamenei's death but provide no updates on a successor.
